blocks.content: They rode home together on the last day, their breath making shapes in the cold air, the trees on her street gone bare.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I'm sorry. I know I said it on AIM but I wanted to say it right.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Ask me again in a little while. You said that. Is it a little while yet.
She looked at him over the handlebars.
They rode the rest of the way to her street without saying much, and stopped at the end of her walk, and the winter quiet sat on everything.
She looked at him when she said it. He held it.
Her mom's car pulled into the driveway. They both looked. Mrs. Jones got out with grocery bags, waved at Kit, went inside.
She took her bike up the walk. He watched her go.
